title: Play-Doh 4 Pack Confetti Compound, Creative Play for 2+ Year Olds, Arts and Crafts
features: CREATIVE COLOURS FOR IMAGINATIVE PLAY: This 4-pack of Play-Doh modelling compound comes with festive confetti mixed into vibrant colours, sparking endless creative play for kids.
FESTIVE COLOURS FOR EVERY CREATION: Inspire imagination with this colourful pack featuring blue, yellow, white, and pink Play-Doh. Perfect for fun arts and crafts activities.
LARGE CANS FOR ENDLESS FUN: Each 85-gram can provides plenty of modelling clay to share and create with, making it an ideal choice for hands-on play and group projects.
QUALITY YOU CAN TRUST: Play-Doh has been a go-to for creative play since 1956. Made with flour, salt, and water, this non-toxic compound is perfect for learning toys and arts and crafts.
SQUISH, ROLL, AND CREATE: Let kids squish, roll, and create as they explore their imagination with this play dough. A great tool for pretend play and boosting fine motor skills.
description: Product Description The Play-Doh 4 Pack Confetti Compound brings a burst of colour and creativity into playtime! This set includes vibrant colours mixed with confetti bits for added texture and fun. Perfect for little hands, this non-toxic compound encourages kids aged 2 and up to engage in imaginative creative play. Whether they’re shaping animals, characters, or abstract designs, this set provides endless possibilities for artistic expression. It's an excellent tool for developing fine motor skills and fostering arts and crafts activities that spark creativity and joy. The Play-Doh 4 Pack Confetti Compound is a fun and creative gift for kids who love to craft. With its vibrant colors and playful texture, little ones can create bright decorations and imaginative shapes for any occasion. Perfect for group activities, rainy days, or just some hands-on fun at home, this set encourages creativity and keeps kids entertained with endless possibilities. Safety Warning Ages 2 years and up Notice to parents: Contains wheat. Compound not intended to be eaten. Non-toxic. Conforms to: ASTM D-4236. To clean, allow to dry, then scrape or vacuum. Moulded results vary depending on child’s age and level of skill.
